sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ رَامِزٌ خَطًّا طَوِيلًا مَرْسُومًا عَلَى جِدَارِ الْغُرْفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ramiz je pronašao dugačku liniju nacrtanu na zidu sobe.
sentences.translationEn: Ramiz found a long line drawn on the wall of the room.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ بِقَلَمٍ أَسْوَدَ وَلَمْ يَعْرِفْ مَنْ فَعَلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Bila je nacrtana crnom olovkom i nije znao ko je to uradio.
sentences.translationEn: It was in black pen and he did not know who had done it.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَ أَخَاهُ الصَّغِيرَ وَنَظَرَ إِلَيْهِ بِجِدِّيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Pitao je mlađeg brata i ozbiljno ga pogledao.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his little brother and looked at him seriously.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْأَخُ الصَّغِيرُ: كُنْتُ أَقِيسُ طُولِي!
sentences.translation: Mlađi brat je rekao: Mjerio sam svoju visinu!
sentences.translationEn: The little brother said: I was measuring my height!

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَ رَامِزٌ وَقَالَ: يَجِبُ أَنْ تَسْتَخْدِمَ الْوَرَقَ لَا الْجِدَارَ.
sentences.translation: Ramiz se nasmijao i rekao: Moraš koristiti papir, a ne zid.
sentences.translationEn: Ramiz laughed and said: You must use paper not the wall.
